_comment: Add to the egg's `variables` array (PTDL_v2 export format). Admin-only transport for per-server slice placement; Wings validates the value against its allowlist/namespace regardless.
name: Wings Cgroup Parent
description: Admin-only: systemd slice this server's containers are placed under (Docker HostConfig.CgroupParent). Must be within the node's allowed namespace (wings-*.slice) or docker.allowed_cgroup_parents. Leave empty for the node default. Requires cgroup-parent patched Wings.
